calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim
Off Calendar Aug-01-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Pamela A. Underwood, Esq., Asst. District Attorney, Tel. 415.551.9544, appearing for petitioner and moving party.

No other appearance. The court ruled on the motion as follows: PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim is granted. Order signed in open court. Pro Tem Judge: Robert Kane; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
